metric_definitions.adjusted_rand_index: Adjusted Rand index between predicted labels and sampled labels on the evaluation set.
metric_definitions.aligned_accuracy: Fraction of evaluation labels matched after deterministic permutation alignment between predicted and sampled labels.
metric_definitions.estimated_edge_count: Total number of estimated undirected off-diagonal edges across aligned components.
metric_definitions.fallback_count: Count of component-level sparse-precision fallback events recorded during fitting.
metric_definitions.support_f1: F1 score of the undirected off-diagonal precision-support estimate after component alignment against the synthetic truth.
metric_definitions.support_precision: Precision of the undirected off-diagonal precision-support estimate after component alignment against the synthetic truth.
metric_definitions.support_recall: Recall of the undirected off-diagonal precision-support estimate after component alignment against the synthetic truth.
metric_definitions.test_score: Average observed-data log-likelihood on the synthetic test set.
metric_definitions.train_score: Average observed-data log-likelihood on the synthetic training set.
metric_definitions.true_edge_count: Total number of true undirected off-diagonal edges across components.
metric_definitions.warning_count: Count of warning messages recorded during fitting.

scenarios.description: Two-component low-dimensional mixture with clear separation.
Two-component low-dimensional mixture with stronger overlap.
